Problem Library

Select an interactive problem to solve. Remember, you must find the answer by querying the system!

easybinary-searchinteractive

Find the Hidden Number

You are playing a guessing game with the system. The system has chosen a secret number <code>X</code> hidden in the range <code>[1, 100]</code>. Your goal is to find <code>X</code> by asking queries.

⚡ 7 queries max🎯 2 attempts limit
